message:
test(oracle): add 13 conformance test suites (418 total)

New suites: cross-type comparisons, aliased subquery column refs,
null-safe operations, schema introspection (sqlite_master), multirow
INSERT, unicode strings, nested CTE references, complex WHERE subquery,
date arithmetic, multi-index queries, expression index queries,
VACUUM/integrity, GROUP_CONCAT null handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
